rows.label: tlk70000068_03_msg0001
rows.name:
A gardener's job isn't just pushing
around rocks and sand to make
everything look pretty, you know.

rows.label: tlk70000068_03_msg0002
rows.name:
My dad says it's all about
cultivating relationships
between plants and the soil.

rows.label: tlk70000068_03_msg0003
rows.name:
You have to know all sorts of things
or the garden will fail. My dad says
it's like being a doctor for nature.

rows.label: tlk70000068_03_msg0004
rows.name:
A gardener fixes gardens, and heals
the hearts of those who see them.

rows.label: tlk70000068_03_msg0005
rows.name:
It goes over my head. I've spent a lot
of time with my dad, but never thought
of gardening like that at all.
